description_long: This is a modern residential house set within a spacious, landscaped lot featuring a mix of open green lawns, tree-lined borders, and a driveway leading to a garage. The house itself has a contemporary architectural style with clean lines, flat and slightly sloped roofs, and a combination of brick and concrete exterior finishes. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The property includes a fenced backyard area, a driveway with parking space, and a front garden with decorative shrubs and trees. The layout suggests multiple living zones, possibly including a main residence and an auxiliary structure or garage. The overall setting is suburban, with the house positioned centrally and surrounded by manicured landscaping.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, brick and concrete finishes, and landscaped grounds featuring trees, a driveway, and a fenced backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, front garden, and symmetrical tree-lined approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced backyard, auxiliary structure, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, rear facade with large windows, and the open lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, and the full extent of the landscaped lot.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door flanked by landscaping and pathway lighting.
